pages.text: A Silver Vat is an attachment for a $(item)Furnace$() that is used to capture any $(l:resources/silver_deposits)Silver Deposits$(/l) that are left over when smelting $(item)Gold Ore$(). Simply place one or more on the side of a Furnace and begin smelting. Occasionally, some $(item)Silver$() will be captured in the vat. Right-click on the vat to pick up the collected Deposits.
For space efficiency reasons, multiple Furnaces can be placed next to a single Vat.$(br)$(item)Hoppers$() can be used to automatically extract any collected Silver.
